# Pull Request Review Checklist

## Change Type

Select all that apply:

- [ ] Documentation / repository navigation
- [ ] Typo or formatting correction
- [ ] Metadata / citation / archive update
- [ ] Generated index or registry output
- [ ] Validator / tooling / CI change
- [ ] Governance amendment proposal
- [ ] New instrument proposal
- [ ] Licence / stewardship material
- [ ] Other:

## Affected Files, Domains, or Instruments

List the affected files and, where relevant, the CAM domain, instrument code, schedule, charter, law, registry, or generated output.

-

## Governance Effect

- [ ] This change is metadata-only or documentation-only.
- [ ] This change affects generated outputs only.
- [ ] This change affects validator/tooling behavior.
- [ ] This change is doctrinal or may alter governance meaning.
- [ ] This change affects instrument status, effect, enforcement, review state, authority role, hashes, or amendment ledgers.
- [ ] This change affects licence, citation, stewardship, DOI, Zenodo, archival, or release metadata.

If any governance-effect box is checked, explain the effect and review need:

## Generated Outputs

- [ ] Not applicable.
- [ ] Generated indices/registries were rebuilt.
- [ ] Generated indices/registries were not rebuilt; reason:

Commands or workflow used:

```text

```

## Validation

List validators, parse checks, Markdown checks, or CI workflows run:

```text

```

Known validation limitations or expected failures:

## Sensitive Information Check

- [ ] This PR does not include credentials, private screenshots, personal data, exploit details, proprietary logs, or unredacted AI interaction evidence.
- [ ] Any sensitive material has been removed or routed through an appropriate non-public pathway.

## Follow-up Actions

- [ ] No follow-up release notes, archive, DOI, Zenodo, or public-interface action is required.
- [ ] Repository-level release notes should be updated.
- [ ] Zenodo/archive action may be required.
- [ ] Public CAM Governance Interface follow-up may be required.
- [ ] Maintainer/steward review is required before adoption.

Notes for reviewers:
